framework.name: Agent Credential Authority (ACA) + Agent Registry Service (ARS)
framework.description: Proposes two new infrastructure components: ACA (trusted third party issuing X.509 certs and identity tokens to agents) and ARS (agent identity registration and discovery-matching). Credential requests require Proof of Possession, Remote Attestation, AIBOM, Provider Endorsement, and Identity Binding.
framework.raw_quote: ACA (Agent Credential Authority): A trusted third party that issues and manages credentials for agents. Credential formats include but not limited to: X.509 certificates, identity tokens, etc.
